properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Satan has hidden His enchantment In everything, in every place and every home And we really don't know Where else he is hiding But Lord we know where we are safe In God's dominion Gods under his word And your blood applied in our hearts

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Heal our homes Lord Heal our spirit Let us know why we are here As pilgrims, as strangers Let's be strong, lets keep hope All along Joyfully living, and praising you For everything that you will bring all the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are coming now lord This we know But we hate To see our homes just likes this Broken and forsaken, Sad and tired From serving you and doing good Our children hurting, Our lives lacking From being a praise And honor to you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the spirit of sacrificing Reign in every heart And every soul Giving, forgiving Healing and soothing The tears and pains we get along Never counting ill or evil But always-in praise And honor to you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When tears flow Lord When I am heart broken It is hard to see your love and your grace I don't know how To sacrifice, To forgive And to heal the pain in me Lord I need you More to know you That everything is your will For my life

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let our homes Lord Be together Over on the other shore For a thousand years, For eternity With Jesus as the King We will reign with him Mercies and kindness Love and goodness Let our homes be now Like heaven above
